app.name: WeChat Markdown Editor
app.one_liner: A highly streamlined Markdown editor that instantly renders documents into clean, publication-ready WeChat rich text with AI-assisted writing, extended syntax, and multi-platform deployment.

screens.name: Editor & Preview
screens.purpose: Primary workspace for composing Markdown and viewing real-time WeChat-style rendering with AI sidebar support.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist current document state as a local draft or exported file.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate basic AI assistant with one provider
acceptance_tests: AI assistant responds to prompts using document context and generates relevant content.
User can type Markdown and see live WeChat-formatted preview.
